overall.description: First-person exploration through a gothic castle interior (Hogwarts Legacy), moving from dark ornate chambers through the Long Gallery and Central Hall, ascending grand staircases, and exploring the main entrance hall with other students present. The video showcases high-quality UE5 graphics with warm lighting and detailed stone architecture.

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches large wooden doors in the Central Hall, opens them to reveal a bright, sunlit grand entrance hall with marble floors. A student stands near the base of a sweeping grand staircase as the camera enters the spacious atrium.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the dim, ornate depths of a gothic castle into a sun-drenched grand atrium before retreating back into a narrow, shadowed corridor. It begins in a dark antechamber with intricate carvings, ascending a stone staircase through a golden archway into a vaulted corridor lined with glowing circular lights. As the path opens into the Long Gallery, the environment shifts to a wider space filled with ivy-covered walls and framed portraits, before the camera winds through armor-lined halls and up a lantern-lit spiral staircase. The scene then expands dramatically as large wooden doors open to reveal a bright, marble-floored entrance hall where the camera ascends a grand staircase past a monumental statue and students in robes. Finally, the light fades as the camera passes through an ornate red door, transitioning from the airy atrium back into a dimly lit, narrow passage illuminated by a single hanging lantern.
